hero.title: Manage your whole business within ONE app!
hero.subtitle: In Labamu you can do everything, manage your business and increase your income!

form.title: Login to Labamu Ecommerce
form.subtitle: Manage all your online store needs
form.helperText: Labamu help your business to continue growing!

firstTime.title: First time accessing Labamu Ecommerce?
firstTime.subtitle: Complete your website setup once to start syncing products and content from the Labamu App.

basic.title: Basic Information
basic.subtitle: Fill in some basic information of your web
basic.logoHelper: Drag and drop an image or click to select
basic.logoFormats: PNG, JPG or JPEG Max 5 mb.
basic.syncSubtitle: Select where product and catalog data will be synced from.
basic.labamuAppDescription: Use catalog data from Labamu App

template.title: Select a Template
template.subtitle: Pick the storefront template that matches your brand.

styling.title: Styling
styling.subtitle: Customize the look and feel of your storefront

color.title: Color Scheme
color.subtitle: Select a color scheme that matches your brand identity

font.title: Font
font.subtitle: Select typography that best represents your brand voice

banner.title: Banner (0/3)
banner.subtitle: Upload a banner image for a shopfront. PNG or JPG max 5 MB (Min. 1 Banner)

skip.title: Skip website setup?
skip.description: You can set it up later from the dashboard.

ssoError.title: Authentication Failed
ssoError.message: Your session token is malformed, expired, or has been tampered with. Access to Labamu Ecommerce could not be verified.
